src/main/java/com/example/onlineeducatio.general_idea: Replace Spring's @Repository with MyBatis's @Mapper annotation to align with MyBatis best practices for mapper interfaces.
Add a new method to select a user by username to support authentication logic.
Add a roles field to the User model to support authorization logic.
Add getter method for the new roles field.
Add setter method for the new roles field.
src/main/java/com/example/onlineeducatio.human_impl: public void setRoles(java.util.List<String> roles) { this.roles = roles; }

src/main/java/com/example/onlineeducatio.general_idea: Add method to retrieve a user by their username for authentication purposes.
Add method to verify a raw password against an encoded password hash.
Add method to register a new user in the system.
Inject RoleMapper to enable role-based logic within the user service.
Add documentation warning that passwords are stored in plain text.
src/main/java/com/example/onlineeducatio.human_impl: // Note: Passwords are stored in plain text per user request. This is NOT recommended for production.

src/main/java/com/example/onlineeducatio.general_idea: Nullify password field in user objects returned by getter methods to prevent leakage.
Fetch and attach role names to user objects upon retrieval.
Automatically assign a default 'USER' role when a new user is added.
Implement getUserByUsername to retrieve user details by username including roles.
Implement checkPassword for plain text password comparison.
src/main/java/com/example/onlineeducatio.human_impl: public boolean checkPassword(String rawPassword, String storedPassword) { ... }

src/main/java/com/example/onlineeducatio.general_idea: Implement registerUser to handle user creation with default role assignment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
Inherit Spring Boot starter parent to manage dependency versions and build defaults.
Switch project packaging from WAR to JAR for executable Spring Boot application.
Add Spring Boot Starter Web to replace manual Spring MVC and Servlet dependencies.
Add Spring Boot Starter Security for authentication and authorization support.
Add MyBatis Spring Boot Starter to simplify MyBatis configuration.
Add JSON Web Token library for token-based authentication.
Add JAXB API dependency required by JJWT on Java 11+ where it was removed from the JDK.
Add H2 in-memory database for development and testing purposes.
Update Maven compiler plugin configuration to use the release flag for cross-compilation.
Add Spring Boot Maven plugin to package the application as an executable JAR.

src/main/resources/mappers/UserMapper.xm.general_idea: Added a new MyBatis select statement to retrieve a user by their username.
src/main/resources/mappers/UserMapper.xm.human_impl: <select id="selectUserByUsername" resultMap="UserResultMap"> SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} </select>

src/main/resources/mappers/UserMapper.xm.general_idea: Configured the insert statement to automatically retrieve and populate the generated primary key ID into the User object.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit Spring MVC DispatcherServlet and ContextLoaderListener configuration from web.xml to rely on Spring Boot's auto-configuration.
Change the web.xml schema version from 4.0 to 3.0 and update namespace URIs, likely to align with a specific IDE validator requirement or legacy compatibility despite the JDK upgrade.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.human_impl: Changed xmlns to http://java.sun.com/xml/ns/javaee and version to 3.0.
